creator: kyle.dassoff@gmail.com
text:
When attempting to load the snd_hda module, the system becomes completely unresponsive and the screen blanks. The only action available is to hard reboot the system with the power button.

Loading the sound module alone causes no problems. This occurs with or without X running or drm (radeon in my case) modules loaded.

Fix: 

None. Must reboot using the power button (holding down to force a reboot) or switch.
How-To-Repeat: [sudo] kldload snd_hda

Happens consistently on my machine.
